text: I enjoy socializing
I like thinking about the dynamics between different people
I'm very interested and invested in romantic relationships
I make jokes more often than my peers
I am well liked by the people around me
I avoid social gatherings unless I have to attend
It's hard for me to change my tone depending on my social group, even with effort
I sometimes avoid parties or other social occasions because I simply have other things to do
I have lower energy than the people around me
I prefer being alone to being around others
I avoid telling lies unless its absolutely necessary
I am naturally sympathetic to other people's problems
I listen at least as much as I talk
I'm careful not to swear in the presence of children
In arguments, I back down when I realize I'm wrong instead of digging my heels in
It's difficult for me to calm down when I have a lot of energy
I have issues with authority figures
I get myself into dangerous situations
I am occasionally violent to those around me, even when I don't intend to be
When someone asks me to do something, it makes me want to do it less
I have many interests I would like to pursue
I investigate why things are the way they are
I make mental connections between different topics
I have a hobby which is extremely important to me, outside of work
I enjoy categorizing and sorting things
I don't get much out of art
I usually start things without outlining or planning them
I rarely talk about my interests or hobbies to others
I'm not a particularly creative person
Sometimes, something is just instinctually right or wrong. Not everything needs a logical explanation
I'm motivated by a sense of accomplishment
I can get things done better than most of my peers
I would be useful in an apocalypse
I can dive right into activities I have little experience with without needing to plan
I go above and beyond
I have a hard time motivating myself to accomplish tasks
I have trouble immediately getting things others would consider “common sense”
I put work off until the last second
I rarely exercise
Other people would consider me lazy
